edgeCases: skip-if-exists: baseline present and !force returns Outcome{Skipped:true} WITHOUT calling Save; cmd maps to non-zero exit
clean repo / 0-finding baseline: report says '0 accepted findings — nothing to ratchet'
byte-identical to Record+Save: Adopt writes via the same Save, verified equal bytes vs reference
force flag overwrites an existing baseline and exits 0
json verdict exit semantics: adopted->exit 0, skipped->non-zero, per_gate is empty map (not null) on skip
